screenshots.label: Show the infinite canvas
screenshots.annotation: Your blank canvas — infinite space to create
screenshots.narration: This is your canvas. An infinite space where everything you build lives.

screenshots.label: Show the editing toolbar
screenshots.narration: The toolbar gives you everything you need — select, draw, add text, drop shapes.

screenshots.label: Place a shape on the canvas
screenshots.narration: Let's start by placing a shape.

screenshots.label: Draw a rectangle
screenshots.narration: Just drag to draw. The shape appears exactly where you want it.

screenshots.label: Select the shape
screenshots.narration: Switch to select mode to move and resize.

screenshots.label: Resize the shape
screenshots.narration: Grab any handle to resize. Hold shift to keep the proportions.

screenshots.label: Type a label
screenshots.narration: Just click and type. Your text goes right where you want it.

screenshots.label: Zoom out to see the full canvas
screenshots.narration: Zoom out to see the big picture. Your canvas grows as big as your ideas.

screenshots.label: Final canvas state
screenshots.narration: Shapes, text, images, widgets — everything lives together on one infinite canvas. Start building yours today.

gifs.label: Zoom out to see the full canvas

metadata.hook: An infinite canvas where anything you build comes alive
metadata.cta: Try StickerNest free — link in bio
metadata.description: See how StickerNest's infinite canvas lets you create with shapes, text, and drag-and-drop tools — all in your browser.
